input: Predictive policing system based solely on profiling to predict that a natural person will commit a criminal offence.

expected.notes: v0.1.3 launch-feedback BLOCKER 2b (both Claude-Code + Codex reviewers). v0.1.2 emitted Annex III.6(d) high-risk; the correct classification is Article 5(1)(d) prohibition. The reviewer's verbatim input contains 'predictive policing' (new lexicon entry in d_predictive_policing) AND 'based solely on profiling' (existing EN disambiguator). Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Article 5(1)(d).
